creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: repocopy->open

Repocopy complete.  If there are going to be a lot more of these rrdtool 
copies, please batch them all up into one PR with a list in the format of: 

ports/oldcategory/port ports/newcategory/port 

It will make doing them much easier.  Thanks.
